methods.long copy(InputStream from, OutputStream: Copies all bytes from the input stream to the output stream.
methods.long copy(ReadableByteChannel from, Writ: Copies all bytes from the readable channel to the writable channel.
methods.InputStream limit(InputStream in, long l: Wraps a InputStream, limiting the number of bytes which can be read.
methods.ByteArrayDataInput newDataInput(byte[] b: Returns a new ByteArrayDataInput instance to read from the bytes array from the beginning.
Returns a new ByteArrayDataInput instance to read from the bytes array, starting at the given position.
methods.ByteArrayDataInput newDataInput(ByteArra: Returns a new ByteArrayDataInput instance to read from the given ByteArrayInputStream.
methods.ByteArrayDataOutput newDataOutput(): Returns a new ByteArrayDataOutput instance with a default size.
methods.ByteArrayDataOutput newDataOutput(ByteAr: Returns a new ByteArrayDataOutput instance which writes to the given ByteArrayOutputStream.
methods.ByteArrayDataOutput newDataOutput(int si: Returns a new ByteArrayDataOutput instance sized to hold size bytes before resizing.
methods.OutputStream nullOutputStream(): Returns an OutputStream that simply discards written bytes.
methods.int read(InputStream in, byte[] b, int o: Reads some bytes from an input stream and stores them into the buffer array b.
methods.T readBytes(InputStream input, ByteProce: Process the bytes of the given input stream using the given processor.
methods.void readFully(InputStream in, byte[] b): Attempts to read enough bytes from the stream to fill the given byte array, with the same behavior as DataInput.readFully(byte[]).
methods.void readFully(InputStream in, byte[] b,: Attempts to read len bytes from the stream into the given array starting at off, with the same behavior as DataInput.readFully(byte[], int, int).
methods.void skipFully(InputStream in, long n): Discards n bytes of data from the input stream.
methods.byte[] toByteArray(InputStream in): Reads all bytes from an input stream into a byte array.
